headline: Intuitive Surgical hit by cybersecurity phishing incident
summary: The surgical robotics firm said that an unauthorized third party accessed customer business and contact information, as well as employee and corporate data.

headline: Wall Street Analysts Think Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Could Surge 29.72%: Read This Before Placing a Bet
summary: The average of price targets set by Wall Street analysts indicates a potential upside of 29.7% in Intuitive Surgical (ISRG). While the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric is questionable, the positive trend in earnings estimate revisions might translate into an upside in the stock.

headline: Intuitive Surgical Expands Direct Southern Europe Operations To Shape Growth Story
summary: Intuitive Surgical, ticker NasdaqGS:ISRG, has completed the acquisition of its Southern European distribution business. The move shifts da Vinci and Ion system distribution in Italy, Spain, Portugal, and related markets to direct operations under Intuitive Surgical. The transaction consolidates regional activities and brings hundreds of new employees into the company’s European organization. Intuitive Surgical enters this transition with a current share price of $479.27 and a mixed recent...
